_comment: Synthetic committee meeting recaps + transcript excerpts + action items for the B.B.A. AACSB reaffirmation, across TWO distinct committees (curriculum, program-review). action_items carry their own ids, owners (people ids), due dates, status. MTG-003 is a restricted personnel session.

meetings.title: Curriculum Committee — B.B.A. Assessment Plan
meetings.recap: Latest curriculum committee meeting (04-JUN). The committee DECIDED to approve the revised B.B.A. assessment plan, adopting the new written-communication and analytical-reasoning learning outcomes with updated rubrics. It assigned the assurance-of-learning follow-up: close the loop on the written-communication rubric using the current assessment cycle data. Ada Okonkwo owns the assurance-of-learning gap closure.
meetings.transcript_excerpt: Dr. Mark Feldman: 'The revised assessment plan is approved — written communication and analytical reasoning with the new rubrics.' Dr. Ada Okonkwo: 'I'll close the assurance-of-learning loop on written communication once the data pull is in.' Dr. Laura Simmons: 'Good — that's our biggest AACSB risk, so it has to be documented.'

action_items.text: Close the assurance-of-learning loop on the written-communication rubric using current cycle data
Publish the approved revised B.B.A. assessment plan to the program SharePoint

meetings.title: Program-Review Committee — B.B.A. Course Sequence
meetings.recap: Latest program-review committee meeting (06-JUN). The committee reviewed the proposed B.B.A. course-sequence change (moving the statistics prerequisite earlier). It did NOT yet sign off — it conditionally approved pending confirmation that the catalog and the curriculum committee's assessment plan are aligned. Sign-off deferred to the next meeting once the catalog comparison is provided.
meetings.transcript_excerpt: Dr. Nadia Rahman: 'I'm comfortable with the sequence change in principle, but I won't sign off until the catalog reflects it and it aligns with the new assessment plan.' Dr. Laura Simmons: 'We'll get you the catalog comparison this week.'

action_items.text: Provide catalog comparison confirming the B.B.A. course-sequence change
Schedule program-review committee sign-off vote on the course-sequence change

meetings.title: Faculty Personnel Review (closed session)
meetings.recap: Closed personnel session with the provost. Reviewed a faculty reappointment matter related to the B.B.A. program staffing. (Restricted: personnel-confidential.)
meetings.transcript_excerpt: Dr. Gloria Hahn: 'This stays in closed session.' Dr. Laura Simmons: 'Understood — personnel-confidential.'
